subcodes.first_line: ...The world is mortal. In one instant it will pass away; but the principle of ease and tranquillity is the soul
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @soul; spirit after death, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
